description: Composition Pink, cream and black printed dress made of 100% cotton, has a wide round neck, double layer cap sleeves, buttoned opening at back neck, bow and belt at front which ties at the back, skirt gathered with tucks to the waistband, pink printed trims and branding embroidered at front hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold on a gentle cycle Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low Do not dry in sunlight Medium steam iron Dress your little one up in this pretty dress and watch her melt hearts wherever she goes! The cotton fabric will keep her cool and comfortable while the pink colour and floral print are sure to make this her party wear favourite.
